message:
feat: orbit features redirect to local install in demo mode (#5336)

On console.kubestellar.io (demo mode), clicking "Set Up Orbit" or
"Create Orbit" now opens the SetupInstructionsDialog (same as the
Demo button) instead of trying to create orbit missions. This lets
demo visitors see the orbit UI flow while directing them to install
the console locally to use it.

Applied to both OrbitSetupOffer (post-install) and StandaloneOrbitDialog
(sidebar "Add Orbit" button).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
